title: phleum pratense subsp. microstachyum
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. microstachyum, also known as meadow timothy or small-spiked meadow grass, is a subspecies of the timothy grass plant, characterized by its smaller spikelets and shorter height compared to the common timothy grass. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Phleum pratense subsp. microstachyum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties.
